overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a snowy mountain pass at night, illuminated by the aurora borealis. The player character ascends a winding trail between rocky outcrops and encounters a wolf crossing the path. The footage appears to be from a high-quality survival video game with cinematic lighting and atmospheric snow effects.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow snowy mountain pass between rocky outcrops

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow rocky corridor, following the trail of footprints in the snow

entered.detail: dark rocky cliff face covered in snow on the left side of the path
steep rocky outcrop with snow patches on the right side
narrow path with visible footprints winding through the snow
snow-covered mountain peaks visible through the gap ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow, enclosed mountain pass with steep rocky walls on both sides. The camera moves forward along a snowy trail marked by footprints, heading toward a distant mountain ridge visible through the gap ahead. The lighting is dim, suggesting nighttime or heavy overcast conditions.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy mountain slope under aurora borealis

events.description: exits the narrow rocky corridor into an open mountain slope with full sky visibility

agents.ego_description: walking uphill on the open snowy slope, heading toward the aurora-lit ridge ahead

entered.detail: green and blue northern lights illuminating the night sky above the mountain ridge
gentle snow-covered incline rising to the left of the trail
steep snow-covered mountain slope on the right side

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up from the narrow pass into a wide, exposed snowy slope. The aurora borealis becomes visible in the night sky, casting an ethereal blue-green glow over the landscape. The rocky walls give way to open snowfields as the path continues ascending toward the distant ridge.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain trail with wildlife encounter

events.description: brief darkness flashes across the screen, then returns to aurora-lit visibility
wolf emerges from the left side of the trail and crosses the path ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing up the snowy trail, approaching and passing a wolf that crosses the path

notable_agents.action: wolf crossing the snowy path from left to right, then moving away into the snow-covered slope

entered.detail: gray wolf walking across the snowy trail, illuminated by the aurora light

segments.scene_description: The ascent continues under the aurora-lit sky. A brief flash of darkness occurs, possibly from the aurora's intensity shifting. Shortly after, a wolf appears on the trail, crossing from the left side and moving away into the snow. The camera passes the wolf and continues up the narrowing path toward the mountain ridge.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow snowy pass leading to mountain ridge gap

agents.ego_description: walking up the final stretch of the snowy trail toward the ridge gap ahead

entered.detail: narrow pass between two snow-covered mountain peaks, silhouetted against the aurora

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the approach to a narrow gap in the mountain ridge. The terrain becomes more enclosed again as the path leads directly toward the silhouetted mountain pass. The aurora continues to illuminate the sky overhead as the camera moves steadily toward the ridge gap, completing the ascent.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous ascent through a mountain pass that transforms from a dim, enclosed corridor into a vast, aurora-lit expanse before narrowing again toward a distant ridge. It begins by moving forward along a snowy trail flanked by steep rocky walls under a heavy, dark sky. As the camera emerges from the narrow pass, the landscape opens into wide snowfields where the aurora borealis suddenly reveals itself, casting an ethereal blue-green glow over the ascending path. The scene continues under this shimmering light, momentarily flickering in intensity as a wolf crosses the trail from the left and vanishes into the snow. Finally, the terrain closes in once more, guiding the camera steadily toward a silhouetted gap in the mountain ridge beneath the glowing night sky.
